SEARCH
Package io.github.javainvaders

Class Player

java.lang.Object
io.github.javainvaders.Player
public class Player extends Object
Represents a player ship. Holds position, lives, score and shooting state. Also handles the blink animation when the player dies and respawns.
Author:
Larissa R. G.; Vinicius S. F.

    A bullet fired by a player ship.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(int index, float x)
      Creates a new player at the given x position.
      Parameters:
      index - player number (1 or 2)
      x - starting horizontal center

  • Method Details

    • loadConfig

      public static void loadConfig(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.JsonValue config)
      Loads player config values from JSON data.
      Parameters:
      config - the JSON section containing player settings

    • rect

      public com.badlogic.gdx.math.Rectangle rect()
      Returns the hitbox used for collision detection.
      Returns:
      a rectangle centered on the ship

    • killPlayer

      public static void killPlayer(Player p, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<Main.Explosion> explosions)
      Marks a player as dead and starts the respawn blink animation. Also pushes an explosion at the player's position.
      Parameters:
      p - the player to kill
      explosions - list to push the new explosion into

    • allPlayersDead

      public static boolean allPlayersDead(Player p1, Player p2)
      Returns true when both players are dead with no lives remaining.
      Parameters:
      p1 - player one
      p2 - player two
      Returns:
      true if the game is over for both

    • updatePlayer

      public static void updatePlayer(Player p, float dt, int left, int right, int shoot, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<Player.Bullet> bullets, int screenW, float initialShootTimer)
      Updates a single player: handles movement input, shoot cooldown and respawn blink. Fires a bullet when the shoot key is held.
      Parameters:
      p - the player to update
      dt - delta time in seconds
      left - key code for moving left
      right - key code for moving right
      shoot - key code for shooting
      bullets - list to push new bullets into
      screenW - screen width used to clamp position
      initialShootTimer - grace period at level start — no shots if > 0

    • drawShip

      public static void drawShip(Player p, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color c, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.glutils.ShapeRenderer shapes)
      Draws the ship body and wings using shape primitives. Skips drawing on blink-off frames.
      Parameters:
      p - the player to draw
      c - ship color
      shapes - active ShapeRenderer (already begun)

    • drawLives

      public static void drawLives(Player p, float x, float y, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color c, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.glutils.ShapeRenderer shapes)
      Draws small ship icons for each remaining life. Also shows a blinking icon while the player is waiting to respawn.
      Parameters:
      p - player whose lives to draw
      x - left edge where icons start
      y - vertical position of the icons
      c - icon color
      shapes - active ShapeRenderer (already begun)
